test_cases.name: health_check_success
test_cases.description: Verify health check endpoint returns 200 with status ok

test_cases.name: create_author_with_all_fields
test_cases.description: Create author with name, bio, and born_year

test_cases.name: create_author_name_only
test_cases.description: Create author with only required name field

test_cases.name: create_author_missing_name
test_cases.description: Reject author creation when name is missing

test_cases.name: create_author_empty_name
test_cases.description: Reject author with empty name string

test_cases.name: create_author_invalid_born_year
test_cases.description: Reject author with born_year outside 0-2026 range

test_cases.name: get_author_success
test_cases.description: Retrieve author by id and verify ETag header is present

test_cases.name: get_author_with_etag_match
test_cases.description: Return 304 Not Modified when If-None-Match matches ETag

test_cases.name: get_author_not_found
test_cases.description: Return 404 when author does not exist

test_cases.name: update_author_success
test_cases.description: Update author with partial data

test_cases.name: update_author_etag_mismatch
test_cases.description: Return 412 when If-Match header does not match current ETag

test_cases.name: delete_author_success
test_cases.description: Delete author with no associated books

test_cases.name: delete_author_with_books
test_cases.description: Reject deletion of author with associated books

test_cases.name: create_book_success
test_cases.description: Create book with all required fields

test_cases.name: create_book_duplicate_isbn
test_cases.description: Reject book creation with duplicate ISBN

test_cases.name: create_book_invalid_isbn_length
test_cases.description: Reject book with ISBN outside 10-13 character range

test_cases.name: create_book_nonexistent_author
test_cases.description: Reject book creation with non-existent author_id

test_cases.name: get_book_success
test_cases.description: Retrieve book by id with full details including author and category

test_cases.name: get_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Return 410 Gone when accessing soft-deleted book

test_cases.name: soft_delete_book_success
test_cases.description: Soft delete book by setting is_deleted flag

test_cases.name: restore_deleted_book_success
test_cases.description: Restore soft-deleted book

test_cases.name: restore_non_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Reject restore attempt on non-deleted book

test_cases.name: update_stock_increase
test_cases.description: Increase book stock with positive quantity parameter

test_cases.name: update_stock_decrease
test_cases.description: Decrease book stock with negative quantity parameter

test_cases.name: update_stock_insufficient
test_cases.description: Reject stock update that would result in negative stock

test_cases.name: apply_discount_old_book
test_cases.description: Apply discount to book published more than 1 year ago

test_cases.name: apply_discount_new_book
test_cases.description: Reject discount on book published less than 1 year ago

test_cases.name: apply_discount_invalid_percent
test_cases.description: Reject discount with percent outside (0, 50] range

test_cases.name: upload_cover_success
test_cases.description: Upload valid JPEG cover image

test_cases.name: upload_cover_unsupported_type
test_cases.description: Reject cover upload with unsupported file type
